app.title: Meetli
app.subtitle: Create calendar events using natural language.

chat.welcome: Describe an event to get started
chat.followUp: Send follow-up messages to fix anything
chat.placeholderFollowUp: Send a correction or new event…
chat.speechNotSupported: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser

event.title: Title
event.signInToAdd: Sign in to add to calendar
event.notRight: Not right? Send another message to correct it.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.signInRequired: Sign in with Google to create calendar events.
errors.authNotConfigured: Google Calendar login is not configured.
errors.invalidDate: Could not determine a valid event date. Please include when the event should happen.
errors.invalidTime: Could not determine a valid event time. Please include when the event should happen.
errors.parseFailed: Unable to parse event details. Please try rephrasing your request.
errors.openAiNotConfigured: OpenAI API key is not configured.
errors.googleNoEventDetails: Google Calendar did not return event details.

whatsapp.noEventToAdd: No event to add yet. Describe an event first, for example: "Team standup tomorrow at 9am for 15 minutes".
whatsapp.createFailed: Could not create the calendar event. Please try again.
whatsapp.tooShortFollowUp: Tell me what to change, for example "make it 4pm".
whatsapp.tooShortInitial: Please add more details so I can create your event.
whatsapp.signInFirst:
To add events to Google Calendar, sign in first:
{{url}}
whatsapp.voiceNotUnderstood: I could not understand the voice message. Please try again or send text.
whatsapp.voiceProcessFailed: Could not process your voice message. Please try sending text instead.
whatsapp.reset: Starting fresh. Describe your next event whenever you are ready.
whatsapp.unknownAction: I did not recognize that action. Describe an event or reply "add".
whatsapp.authSuccessWithEvent: You're signed in with Google! Reply "add" or tap Add to calendar to create your event.
whatsapp.authSuccess: You're signed in with Google! Describe an event and I'll add it to your calendar.
whatsapp.eventFollowUp: Reply with changes (e.g. "make it 4pm") or tap Add to calendar.
